nodes.name: Basic Flutter Kick
nodes.description: Continuous alternating up-down kick from hips

nodes.name: Hand Entry
nodes.description: Enter hand smoothly, fingertips first, in front of shoulder

nodes.name: Pull Phase
nodes.description: Powerful pull through with accelerating speed

nodes.name: Bilateral Breathing
nodes.description: Breath every 3 strokes, maintain rhythm

nodes.name: Recovery & Finish
nodes.description: Smooth arm recovery, relaxed hand exit

nodes.name: Flip Turn
nodes.description: Approach wall, flip quickly, push off in streamline

nodes.name: Underwater Dolphin Kicks
nodes.description: 3-5 dolphin kicks off wall before surfacing

nodes.name: Streamline Off Wall
nodes.description: Push off wall in tight streamline position

nodes.name: Streamline Off Wall: Overhead Arm Lock
nodes.description: Lock hands together and squeeze biceps tightly against the ears to form the upper body streamline shape; practice dryland or standing in the pool to build muscle memory.

nodes.name: Streamline Off Wall: Neutral Head Tuck
nodes.description: Tuck the chin to look straight down, aligning the head with the spine; practice during short surface floats without pushing off the wall to isolate the head position.

nodes.name: Streamline Off Wall: Lower Body Squeeze
nodes.description: Squeeze legs tightly together from hips to ankles and forcefully point the toes; practice during short subsurface glides focusing entirely on lower body tension.

nodes.name: Streamline Off Wall: Horizontal Push-off
nodes.description: Combine the locked arms, neutral head, and tight legs to push off the wall forcefully while looking down to keep the trajectory perfectly horizontal; practice by pushing off from a dead stop and observing glide depth.

nodes.name: Horizontal Body Position
nodes.description: Maintain flat, horizontal body position in water

nodes.name: Horizontal Body Position: Neutral Head Position
nodes.description: Look straight down with a relaxed neck to establish a horizontal baseline without creating downward leverage.

nodes.name: Horizontal Body Position: Chest Press
nodes.description: Actively push the chest down into the water to use lung buoyancy as a fulcrum, naturally lifting the hips.

nodes.name: Horizontal Body Position: Continuous Kick
nodes.description: Maintain a steady, rhythmic flutter kick to generate upward lift for the lower body and prevent sinking legs.

nodes.name: Horizontal Body Position: Low-Profile Breathing
nodes.description: Rotate the head to the side for air without lifting the forehead forward, preserving the horizontal body line.

nodes.name: High-Elbow Catch
nodes.description: Early vertical forearm, catch water with high elbow

nodes.name: High-Elbow Catch: Maintain elbow-wrist height relationship
nodes.description: Practice holding your arm in the water with your elbow consistently held higher than your wrist

nodes.name: High-Elbow Catch: Initiate catch before arm drop
nodes.description: Practice starting the catch movement as your arm enters the water, before your arm has a chance to drop downward

nodes.name: High-Elbow Catch: Avoid early elbow locking
nodes.description: Practice keeping your elbow slightly bent through the initial catch phase, preventing it from locking into a rigid position prematurely

nodes.name: High-Elbow Catch: Coordinate hip rotation with elbow lift
nodes.description: Practice rotating your hip to generate movement that lifts your elbow into the correct high position for the catch
